nasb.text: Take silver and gold, make an ornate crown and set it on the head of Joshua the son of Jehozadak, the high priest.

esv.text: Take from them silver and gold, and make a crown, and set it on the head of Joshua, the son of Jehozadak, the high priest.

cnv.text: 你要拿這金銀來做冠冕，戴在約撒答的兒子大祭司約書亞的頭上，

ccb.text: 要用这些金银制作冠冕，戴在约撒答的儿子约书亚大祭司头上，
